Title: Exempts school district providers of special services or programs for preschool students with disabilities from having to obtain program approval from the commissioner of education
Summary: Exempts school district providers of special services or programs for preschool students with disabilities from having to obtain program approval from the commissioner of education.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to exempting school district providers of special services or programs for preschool students with disabilities from having to obtain program approval from the commissioner of education
